raw: {"perspective": "Communications Strategist", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/assessment/energy-picker.tsx", "issue": "EnergyPicker component does not account for AZ/CIS cultural differences in shame-free language", "recommended_fix": "Modify energy-picker.tsx to include culturally-sensitive messaging for AZ/CIS users, ensuring that the language used is shame-free and aligned with the Constitution's Law 3"}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: EnergyPicker component does not account for AZ/CIS cultural differences in shame-free language
findings.recommended_fix: Modify energy-picker.tsx to include culturally-sensitive messaging for AZ/CIS users, ensuring that the language used is shame-free and aligned with the Constitution's Law 3
